APPS SCRIPT — PROCUREMENT REDEPLOY NOTES
=======================================

Paste google-apps-script-full-merged.gs into the Apps Script project
bound to the Tarmal IT spreadsheet, then Deploy → Manage deployments →
Edit → Version: New version → Deploy.

What this adds
--------------
1) New sheet: Procurement (auto-created on first sync/read)
2) New Drive folder: "Tarmal Procurement Quotes" (for PDF/image uploads)
3) New API:
   - GET  ?resource=procurement
   - POST action=syncProcurement
   - POST action=uploadProcurementAttachment

Procurement sheet columns
-------------------------
Id | Material | Quantity | Unit | Requested By | Status | Needed By | Remarks | Quotes JSON | Updated At

Quotes JSON is an array of objects, for example:
[
  {
    "id": "quote-...",
    "vendor": "Acme Supplies",
    "unitPrice": "250",
    "total": "12500",
    "currency": "KES",
    "validUntil": "2026-08-01",
    "notes": "Includes delivery",
    "fileName": "quote.pdf",
    "mimeType": "application/pdf",
    "driveFileId": "...",
    "driveUrl": "https://drive.google.com/..."
  }
]

Status values used by the portal
--------------------------------
Requested | Quoting | Ordered | Received | Cancelled

After redeploy
--------------
1. Open the portal Procurement tab and click Refresh.
2. Create a test item, add two quotes, attach a PDF/image, confirm View works.
3. Confirm the Procurement sheet and Drive folder exist.

Without redeploy
----------------
The portal still works with localStorage for items/quotes.
File uploads fall back to local preview until Apps Script is updated.
